phrase: The next time you sit down to eat,
visual: a simple round plate with a few basic food shapes on it — a round potato, a small leafy sprig, two simple circle shapes — centered on a plain flat table surface drawn as a flat rectangle, white background

phrase: look at your plate.
visual: a single large simple round plate drawn front-and-center in the frame, thick bold marker outline, a fork on the left side, nothing else, white background

phrase: Someone grew that food with their hands.
visual: two simple stick-figure hands held cupped upward, holding one freshly pulled carrot with a leafy green top, a few small brown soil clumps falling below the roots, white background, centered

phrase: But almost nobody asks who.
visual: a single large bold question mark drawn centered in the frame, thick black marker on white, nothing else in the scene

phrase: And the answer is strange.
visual: one small stick figure standing with one hand pressed to its chin in a thinking pose, a small simple spiral above its head, white background, wide shot

phrase: In America, the average farmer is now fifty-eight years old.
visual: the number '58' written in very large bold hand-drawn marker digits centered on white, underlined with a thick horizontal line, a tiny simple shovel icon drawn to the right, white background

phrase: More than forty percent are over sixty-five.
visual: a simple hand-drawn pie chart circle, a large slice of about 40 percent filled with flat blue color, a small bold label '40%' written beside the slice, white background, centered

phrase: Here in Thailand, it's no different.
visual: a wide rice paddy landscape, flat pale green water surface below a clean straight horizon line, flat pale blue sky above, simple short vertical lines suggesting rice stalks across the field, no figures, very wide and open

phrase: The people who feed us
visual: one stick figure standing tall, holding a large round woven basket piled with simple round and leafy vegetable shapes raised high above its head with both arms, white background, wide shot

phrase: are quietly running out of time.
visual: a tall thin hourglass drawn in bold thick marker lines, nearly all sand settled in the bottom half, the top chamber almost empty, a few sand grains mid-fall, white background, centered

phrase: So where is the next generation?
visual: a wide empty farm field with simple parallel horizontal lines as crop rows across the flat ground, flat pale sky above, flat pale green ground below, not a single figure anywhere, complete emptiness

phrase: I know — because I'm part of it.
visual: one small stick figure standing upright, one hand pressed firmly flat against its own chest, head slightly tilted forward, white background, wide shot

phrase: I grew up on an organic farm in Thailand.
visual: one very small stick figure standing among simple rows of short green plants, a round yellow sun low on a clean horizon line, flat blue sky above, flat green ground below, the figure is tiny in a wide landscape

phrase: And one by one,
visual: three small stick figures in a row, the rightmost one walking away carrying a small rectangle suitcase, the other two standing still and watching, white background, wide shot

phrase: I watched everyone my age leave.
visual: a simple flat road stretching from the bottom foreground toward the horizon, three tiny stick figures walking away down the road getting smaller in the distance, flat pale sky above flat ground, wide and empty

phrase: They went to the city.
visual: three simple flat rectangles of different heights forming a small city skyline against a flat pale sky, one tiny stick figure walking toward them from the left on flat ground, wide shot

phrase: To offices. To screens.
visual: a simple flat desk with a tall rectangle computer monitor on it, the monitor screen a bright flat rectangle suggesting light, no figure, white background, centered

phrase: To money that arrives the same day.
visual: a simple flat rectangle smartphone, the screen showing a large dollar-sign symbol and a small check mark notification bubble, white background, centered, bold marker doodle

phrase: Farming looked like the past.
visual: a single old-fashioned hand plow or worn hoe drawn large in thick bold marker, centered on white, with small scratch marks suggesting age and rust, no figure, just the tool alone on white

phrase: Slow. Dirty. Invisible.
visual: one very small stick figure bent slightly forward with arms reaching toward the ground, surrounded by a large expanse of empty white space, the figure looks small and alone, wide shot

phrase: I almost left too.
visual: one stick figure standing at the exact center of a simple Y-shaped fork in a path, one branch curving toward tiny flat rectangle buildings on the left, one branch curving toward a tiny green plant seedling on the right, white background

phrase: But every morning,
visual: a large simple semicircle sun rising above a flat clean horizon line, flat warm orange-yellow fill, flat pale golden sky above, flat pale ground below, no figures, calm and wide

phrase: I still walk out before the sun.
visual: one very small stick figure walking forward alone, a tiny semicircle sun just barely peeking above the flat horizon far behind it, flat dark pre-dawn sky, flat dark ground, the figure is tiny against the darkness

phrase: The soil is cold under my feet.
visual: a close detail of two simple flat stick-figure feet standing on a wide flat rectangle of dark brown soil, a few rough dark clumps of earth near the toes, white space above, centered

phrase: I can smell the water
visual: a wide pre-dawn farm scene, three or four gentle wavy horizontal lines drifting above the flat crop rows suggesting mist and moisture, flat pale grey sky, quiet and still, no figures

phrase: before I can see the rows.
visual: flat dark pre-dawn sky, faint simple horizontal crop row lines gradually appearing from fog toward the viewer, flat dark ground, a very tiny stick figure standing far in the distance looking forward

phrase: And here's what no one told us:
visual: one stick figure standing with both arms spread open wide and palms facing out as if about to reveal something, a simple lightbulb outline above its head, white background, wide shot

phrase: this isn't the past.
visual: a simple thick-outlined circle clock with two clock hands, a large bold red X drawn through it with flat red fill, white background, centered, strong and simple graphic

phrase: While I plant,
visual: one small stick figure standing and leaning slightly forward, pressing a small Y-shaped seedling into a small mound of dark brown soil at its feet, white background, wide shot

phrase: I'm teaching myself to code —
visual: a simple flat rectangle tablet or phone screen showing three short horizontal lines in different lengths suggesting lines of code, bold marker outline, white background, centered

phrase: to build with AI.
visual: a simple friendly robot face drawn in bold thick marker — a round square head, two large circle eyes, a simple antenna on top, a rectangular grid-pattern smile — white background, centered, cheerful and clean

phrase: The future doesn't have to replace the soil.
visual: one small stick figure standing, a small seedling plant held in its left hand and a small flat rectangle phone in its right hand, both objects held out slightly at its sides, white background, wide shot

phrase: It can grow out of it.
visual: a simple seedling with two small leaves growing from a mound of dark brown soil, a tiny simple circuit board shape drawn at the base of the plant, white background, centered, hopeful image

phrase: So the next time you look at your plate,
visual: a simple round plate with basic food shapes on it, bold marker outline, white background, centered — a direct visual callback to the opening scene

phrase: remember: someone chose to stay.
visual: one extremely small stick figure standing perfectly centered in a vast wide-open farm field, flat pale green ground stretching to the horizon, flat pale sky above, the tiny figure dwarfed by enormous empty space all around

phrase: Maybe the bravest thing my generation can do
visual: one stick figure standing tall with both arms raised high in a wide V-shape above its head, proud and energetic pose, white background, wide shot

phrase: isn't leaving the land.
visual: the right side of the scene shows a simple farm field with horizontal rows, the left side shows three tiny flat rectangle city buildings, one stick figure stands at center facing the farm side, turned away from the city, white background

phrase: It's coming back to it.
visual: one very small stick figure walking forward toward simple green crop rows stretching to the horizon, a small semicircle sun rising right on the horizon line, flat pale sky above, flat green ground below, hopeful and wide
